rulings.Case Title: RESNICK, DOUGLAS MARK, AS TRUSTEE OF THE PEARL VS. ANGELA CRANDALL et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Deposition Subpoena And For Protective Order
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, September 29, 2014, Line 1: CROSS DEFENDANT GREGORY RESNICK'S Motion To Quash Deposition Subpoena And For Protective Order: Continued to October 8, 2014 at 9:30 AM in Dept. 501 to be heard with other pending motion. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CHARLES C. CHOW et al VS. TED WIN WONG et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Hearing Of Motion For Leave To File Cross-Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, September 29, 2014, Line 5: Motion For Leave To File Cross-Complaint: Granted. Cross-Complainant may file its proposed cross-complaint within 10 days of entry of this Order. "A motion to file a cross-complaint at any time during the course of the action must be granted unless bad faith of the moving party is demonstrated¿" (Silver Organizations, Ltd. v. Frank (1990) 217 Cal.App.3d 94, 99.) Cross-Defendants' substantive arguments, including whether CCBA has standing to bring the cross-claims, may be "raised by demurrer, summary judgment, or other pretrial proceeding after the compulsory cross-complaint has been filed." (Id. at 102.) (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ANTHONY PAK KIN CHENG VS. XIAO CHUAN WU et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Judgment On The Pleadings
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, September 29, 2014, Line 2: DEFENDANTS XIAO CHUAN WU and ANNIE LI's Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings: DENIED. Complaint sufficiently alleges facts to maintain causes of action for violation of CC 789.3, forcible detainer and Intentional Infliction of Emotional Distress. Plaintiff's non-compliance with CRC 2.112 and uncertainty were not asserted as grounds for this motion in the notice of motion. Defendants improperly raise issues of fact regarding their motivation for changing the locks. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DOROTHY MARTINEZ et al VS. MAIRE DWAN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Terminating Sanctions Against Defendant Maire Dwan
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, September 29, 2014, Line 3: PLAINTIFFS DOROTHY MARTINEZ, MICHAEL CORTEZ and RONNEY RENDON's Motion For Terminating Sanctions Against Defendant Maire Dwan: GRANTED. Defendant failed to comply with July 14, 2014 order. Sanctions granted in the amount of $1,625 to be paid to Plaintiff's counsel. Defendant's answer filed on March 6, 2014 is stricken. Defendant may request entry of default. No opposition filed. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: GURSON S. DANG VS. CHARLES RHODES ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, September 29, 2014, Line 4: DEFENDANT DANIEL SOLINA'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT: OFF CALENDAR. Dismissal filed Septmber 15, 2014. (501/REQ)
